steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no upstream dependencies (independent task).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review t0002 papers on hierarchical planning and t0005 findings on judge failure modes.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: t0005 already gathered hierarchical-planning literature; v2 is a re-annotation pass with a known schema.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Skipped: v1 code under t0005/code is already documented inline in this task's plan; no library research needed.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan v2 annotation pipeline: prompts, full problem text, judge sampling, $15 budget cap.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Re-annotate 115 rows under v2 tree schema with full problem text; spot-check >=23 stratified rows with claude-haiku judge.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines to tear down.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: explicit re-annotation under known v2 schema; alternative approaches deferred to v3.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results files including v2-vs-v1 judge accept rate per benchmark.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no published literature comparison applicable to internal annotation re-run.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions: row expansion, human review pass, proxy benchmark remediation.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, finalize task.json.
